infotainment.name: Vehicle Infotainment System
infotainment.description: In-vehicle infotainment platform providing media playback, navigation, smartphone connectivity, and user interface interaction with the vehicle.
infotainment.hint: Typical architecture includes head unit processor, operating system, connectivity modules, display system, media processing, storage, and vehicle network interfaces.

gateway_ecu.name: Vehicle Gateway ECU
gateway_ecu.description: Central communication controller responsible for routing and filtering messages between different in-vehicle networks.
gateway_ecu.hint: Typical architecture includes network controllers, message routing logic, firewall or filtering modules, security gateway functionality, and diagnostic interfaces.
